daikin1: Nursery Tue. 8:00–9:00pm for 70/74 (Youth Group) Wed. 9:00am–12:00pm for 70/74 (Women’s Study) Thu. 7:30am–3:15pm for 69/75 (Classical Conversations) Thu. 5:30–8:00pm for 69/72 in the summer and 70/74 in the winter (Awana) Sun. 7:00am–1:00pm for 69/72 in the summer and 70/74 in the winter (Church) Sun. 4:30–7:30pm for 67/73 (Journey)
